zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrude Fossard於大約1084年出生在英國越可爾素斯 奧特林頓時，她的父親Nigel Fossard II43歲，母親Osceria de Rotherham40歲。她於1099年與Robert de Meinell在英國越可爾素斯 奧特林頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1120年在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrude Fossard于大约1084年出生在英国越可爾素斯 奧特林頓时，她的父亲Nigel Fossard II43岁，母亲Osceria de Rotherham40岁。她于1099年与Robert de Meinell在英国越可爾素斯 奧特林頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1120年在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fossard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Fozard
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from the Old French personal name Fossard.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrude Fossard was born about 1084, in South Otterington, Yorkshire, England, her father, Nigel Fossard II, was 43 and her mother, Osceria de Rotherham, was 40. She married Robert de Meinell in 1099, in South Otterington, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1120, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrude Fossard est née environ 1084, à South Otterington, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Nigel Fossard II, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Osceria de Rotherham, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Meinell en 1099, à South Otterington, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1120, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrude Fossard um 1084 in South Otterington, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nigel Fossard II 43 und ihre Mutter Osceria de Rotherham 40. Sie hat 1099 in South Otterington, Yorkshire, England Robert de Meinell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1120 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude Fossard è nata il circa 1084 nel South Otterington, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Nigel Fossard II, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Osceria de Rotherham, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Meinell nel 1099, nel South Otterington, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1120, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude Fossardが約1084年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソウス オッテリントンで生まれた時，父Nigel Fossard IIは43歳，母Osceria de Rotherhamは40歳であった。1099年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソウス オッテリントンでRobert de Meinellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1120年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude Fossard(이)가 대략 1084년 영국 요르크실르 소우스 오테링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nigel Fossard II(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Osceria de Rotherham(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1099년 영국 요르크실르 소우스 오테링턴에서 Robert de Meinell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1120년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude Fossard nasceu aproximadamente 1084, em South Otterington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nigel Fossard II, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Osceria de Rotherham, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Meinell em 1099, em South Otterington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1120, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrude Fossard родилась около 1084 г. в местности соут оттирингтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nigel Fossard II было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Osceria de Rotherham, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Meinell в 1099 г. в местности соут оттирингтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1120 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrude Fossard nació aproximadamente 1084, en South Otterington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nigel Fossard II, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Osceria de Rotherham, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Robert de Meinell en 1099, en South Otterington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1120, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años.
